title: Drought – Waterless Worldgen
description: Removes all naturally generated water from the Overworld. No oceans, rivers, lakes, or cave water. Some structures may still contain limited water for balance.
body:
🌵 Drought – Waterless Worldgen

Drought completely removes all naturally generated water from the Overworld, transforming Minecraft into a harsh, dry survival experience.

Oceans vanish. Rivers run dry. Caves are empty and silent. Water is no longer something you stumble upon — it’s something you must earn.

🌍 What this datapack does

❌ Removes oceans, rivers, and lakes

❌ Removes underground water and cave springs

❌ Disables aquifer water entirely

❌ Prevents water from generating during world creation

🌧️ Makes rain-filled cauldrons the only renewable source of water

🏘️ Villages may still contain limited water for balance and playability

⚠️ Important notes

Some structures may still contain limited water for balance.

This datapack only affects newly generated worlds or chunks

Existing worlds will keep any water already generated

Buckets can still place water if obtained

Designed for survival challenge, not realism

🎮 Why play with Drought?

Adds a hardcore survival twist without breaking world generation

Forces creative solutions for hydration and farming

Makes rain, villages, and cauldrons meaningful resources

Works alongside most mods and datapacks



[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-f16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/drought-waterless-worldgen)
